results.title: In 1997, Dharmendra Pradhan, then an ABVP leader, led a student protest against paper leak in Odisha
results.description: According to his old colleagues, in 1997, when Dharmendra Pradhan was the National Secretary of the Akhil Bharatiya Vidyarthi Parishad (ABVP), he led the protest against the Odisha government.

results.title: Iraqi PM Al-Zaidi Lands in Iran for First Official Visit
results.description: (MENAFN) Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi arrived in Iran on Thursday for his first official visit since assuming office, heading a high-level ministerial delegation, according to an Iraqi news ...
